name: Shrimp Benihana
recipeIngredient: 5 Large shrimp, peeled, cleaned and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat griddle to about 350 degrees.
2. Sprinkle the shrimp with salt to taste.
3. Oil the griddle with soybean oil.
4. Place the shrimp on the griddle and sauté for about 3 minutes on each side.
5. Remove the shrimp from the griddle.
6. Mix the melted butter with heavy cream.
7. Cut the shrimp into bite-sized pieces and dot them with the butter and heavy cream mixture.
8. Sprinkle with parsley.
9. Return the shrimp to the griddle and cook for 1 to 2 minutes longer.
10. Squeeze the juice from half a lemon over the shrimp.
11. Remove from the griddle. Serve with ginger sauce.
